title: cotylelobium melanoxylon
intro: Cotylelobium melanoxylon, also known as the ironwood tree, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Dipterocarpaceae and is native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Cotylelobium melanoxylon include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of the plant include making teas, infusions, and extracts from its bark, leaves, and roots, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
